description: Filled sector on a solid surface between two rays from a vertex. Uses loc3d() for coordinates, either inline or as variable references.
utility: Show filled angle sector on a solid

arguments.name: vertex
arguments.description: Sector vertex (inline loc3d or variable reference)

arguments.name: point1
arguments.description: First ray endpoint (inline loc3d or variable reference)

arguments.name: point2
arguments.description: Second ray endpoint (inline loc3d or variable reference)

examples.expression:
C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
S = solidsector(C, loc3d(C, 0, 0, 0), loc3d(C, 0, 100, 0), loc3d(C, 0, 0, 100), "90", c(orange), fo(0.3))

C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
P1 = loc3d(C, 0, 0, 0, c(magenta))
P2 = loc3d(C, 0, 100, 0, c(magenta))
P3 = loc3d(C, 0, 0, 100, c(magenta))
S = solidsector(C, P1, P2, P3, c(orange), fo(0.3))
